plugins.name: email-triage
plugins.description: Epistemic email triage v3.3.0: 30 Bayesian criteria, multi-axis scoring, 4-tier routing with color indicators (🔴🟡🔵⚪). Adds routine mode for scheduled tasks (silencioso con umbral, candidatos dudosos, notificación macOS). Includes dry-run mode, undo/rollback, prompt-injection defense, feedback loop, thread detection, sanitization pipeline, persistent telemetry. Supports iCloud, Gmail, and more.
